entry.title: IDC W56HZV22D0083 (P00018) awarded to BAE SYSTEMS LAND & ARMAMENTS L.P., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE BRADLEY A4 FOLLOW-ON PRODUCTION EFFORT WILL DELIVER M2A4 AND M7A4 VEHICLES FROM VARIOUS INDUCTED LEGACY SOURCE VARIANTS BASED ON THE TDP DEVELOPED UNDER CONTRACT W56HZV-12-C-0358 BRADLEY A4 ECP AND THE TOP-LEVEL VEHICLE DRAWINGS.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: COMBAT, ASSAULT, AND TACTICAL VEHICLES, TRACKED

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: MILITARY ARMORED VEHICLE, TANK, AND TANK COMPONENT MANUFACTURING

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC W56HZV22D0083 (P00020) awarded to BAE SYSTEMS LAND & ARMAMENTS L.P., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: MODIFICATION TO PROVIDE MULTIPLE LINES OF GFP FOR USE ON THE BRADLEY FOPC. THIS MODIFICATION ALSO INCLUDES AN UPDATE TO RFNI FOR GAGE FOR GEARS OFF THE PIM CONTRACT. LASTLY, ATTACHMENT 0023 IS UPDATED FOR AN ADMINISTRATIVE CORRECTION.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: COMBAT, ASSAULT, AND TACTICAL VEHICLES, TRACKED

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: MILITARY ARMORED VEHICLE, TANK, AND TANK COMPONENT MANUFACTURING

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: UPDATE ATTACHMENT 0002, CSDR. THE "AS OF" DATE FROM 7/23/2024 TO 7/26/2024 TO ALIGN WITH THE CONTRACTOR'S FISCAL CALENDAR MONTH END. THE REPORTING DUE DATE HAS NOT CHANGED

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: GFP MODIFICATION TO PROVIDE GAINING GFP FROM 0133, ADDITIONAL GFP ADDITIONS, QUANTITY UPDATES, ADDITION OF ACCOUNTABLE DELIVERY ORDERS ON ITEM DESCRIPTION AND UPDATED GFM DELIVERY SCHEDULE.
